prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 84.4 kg; Height 159.2 cm; BMI 33.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 279mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 83.1kg; 9 months ago 83.1kg; 6 months ago 80.7kg; 3 months ago 82.3kg; current 84.4kg), Height (12 months ago 159.2cm; 9 months ago 159.2cm; 6 months ago 159.2cm; 3 months ago 159.2cm; current 159.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 91mmHg; 9 months ago 91mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 85U/L; 9 months ago 85U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 85U/L; current 81U/L), AST (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 66U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 5.5mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.6mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.5mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 2.1mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 926mg/g; 9 months ago 975mg/g; 6 months ago 750mg/g; 3 months ago 1105mg/g; current 676mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 125mg/dL; 3 months ago 108mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
